mapper.select:
SELECT tbbp.ctgry AS ctgry -- 문의구분 , CASE WHEN tbqs.chc = 'LIKE' THEN '만족' WHEN tbqs.chc = 'DISLIKE' THEN '불만족' ELSE '' END AS isSatisfied -- 만족여부 (LIKE/DISLIKE) , tbqs.mdfcn_dt AS satisfactionDate -- 만족여부 답변일 , tbbp.bbs_pst_ttl AS bbsPstTtl -- 제목 , tbbp.reg_dt AS questionDate -- 질문일 , ans.first_reply_dt AS answerTempDate -- 초안 답변일 , hist.final_comp_dt AS ansCnDate -- 최종 답변일
-- [초안 소요일] (날짜차이 - 휴일수)
, IFNULL(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0) ), 0) AS draftResponseWorkDays
-- [최종 소요일] (날짜차이 - 휴일수) , IFNULL(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0) ), 0) AS finalResponseWorkDays FROM ${schema}.bbs tbb INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS first_reply_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'TEMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) ans ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = ans.up_bbs_pst_oid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS final_comp_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'COMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) hist ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = hist.up_bbs_pst_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.qna_dgstfn_evl tbqs ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = tbqs.tbl_oid AND tbqs.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbqs.stts = 'COMPLETED' WHERE tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbb.use_yn = 'Y' AND tbb.stats_yn = 'Y' AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL
AND tbbp.reg_dt >= #{fromQuestionDate}
AND tbbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(#{toQuestionDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY tbbp.reg_dt DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tbbp.reg_dt DESC) AS qnaOrderNo -- 번호 , tbbp.ctgry AS ctgry -- 문의구분 , CASE WHEN tbqs.chc = 'LIKE' THEN '만족' WHEN tbqs.chc = 'DISLIKE' THEN '불만족' ELSE '' END AS isSatisfied -- 만족여부 (LIKE/DISLIKE) , tbqs.mdfcn_dt AS satisfactionDate -- 만족여부 답변일 , ans.first_reply_dt AS answerTempDate -- 초안 답변일 , tbbp.bbs_pst_ttl AS postTitle -- 제목 , tbbp.reg_dt AS questionDate -- 질문일 , hist.final_comp_dt AS ansCnDate -- 최종 답변일
-- [초안 소요일] (날짜차이 - 휴일수)
, IFNULL(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0) ), 0) AS draftResponseWorkDays
-- [최종 소요일] (날짜차이 - 휴일수) , IFNULL(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0) ), 0) AS finalResponseWorkDays FROM ${schema}.bbs tbb INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS first_reply_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'TEMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) ans ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = ans.up_bbs_pst_oid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS final_comp_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'COMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) hist ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = hist.up_bbs_pst_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.qna_dgstfn_evl tbqs ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = tbqs.tbl_oid AND tbqs.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbqs.stts = 'COMPLETED' WHERE tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbb.use_yn = 'Y' AND tbb.stats_yn = 'Y' AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL
AND tbbp.reg_dt >= #{fromQuestionDate}
AND tbbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(#{toQuestionDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY tbbp.reg_dt DESC
